title: Critonia billbergiana
taxonomy: Critonia billbergiana is classified in the family Asteraceae and the genus Critonia. It belongs to the tribe Mutisieae. Critonia billbergiana is native to Mexico and Central America. This plant is a type of flowering plant, specifically a shrub or subshrub. Critonia billbergiana is also known as a Critonia or Wild Sage due to its fragrance.
